# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_aks (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the managed Azure Container Services (AKS) instance.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of a resource group where the managed Azure Container Services (AKS) exists or will be created.

### Optional

- `aad_profile` (String) Profile of Azure Active Directory configuration.
- `addon` (String) Profile of managed cluster add-on. Key can be `http_application_routing`, `monitoring`, `virtual_node` and `azure_keyvault_secrets_provider`. Value must be a dict contains a bool variable `enabled`.
- `agent_pool_profiles` (String) The agent pool profile suboptions.
- `api_server_access_profile` (String) Profile of API Access configuration.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auto_upgrade_profile` (String) Auto upgrade profile for a managed cluster.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `disable_local_accounts` (Boolean) If set to true, getting static credentials will be disabled for this cluster. This must only be used on Managed Clusters that are AAD enabled.
- `dns_prefix` (String) DNS prefix specified when creating the managed cluster.
- `enable_rbac` (Boolean) Enable RBAC. Existing non-RBAC enabled AKS clusters cannot currently be updated for RBAC use.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `identity` (String) Identity for the Server.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `kubernetes_version` (String) Version of Kubernetes specified when creating the managed cluster.
- `linux_profile` (String) The Linux profile suboptions. Optional, provide if you need an ssh access to the cluster nodes.
- `location` (String) Valid azure location. Defaults to location of the resource group.
- `network_profile` (String) Profile of network configuration.
- `node_resource_group` (String) Name of the resource group containing agent pool nodes. Unable to update.
- `pod_identity_profile` (String) Config pod identities in managed Kubernetes cluster.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `security_profile` (String) Security profile for the container service cluster.
- `service_principal` (String) The service principal suboptions.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the AKS. Use `present` to create or update an AKS and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `windows_profile` (String) The Windows profile suboptions.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
